_doc: Save this as `.mcp.json` at your project root. Claude Code will discover it on next launch. The hosted instance at https://emem.dev/mcp is HTTPS-only. Claude Code's schema requires the `type` field to disambiguate the MCP transport (http vs sse vs stdio); `"type": "http"` is the literal identifier MCP defines for the Streamable-HTTP transport family — it does NOT mean the URL is plain HTTP. The actual URL below is HTTPS. The stdio bridge entry is a fallback for older runtimes that don't speak Streamable-HTTP MCP yet.

emem_via_remote._doc: Fallback for environments that need a stdio bridge — install `mcp-remote` first: `npm install -g mcp-remote`
